content: I was naively hoping to create something out of what was to me a profoundly beautiful exchange. And I'm afraid that having lost what cannot be reproduced only goes to show that my ego does get the better of me on occasion, even though I should know better. I thought to force the awe and wonderment I felt on an unsuspecting public for not necessarily unselfish ends perhaps and now that bubble has burst. It may be that my initial enthusiasm will wane but I truly thank you for the incomparable experience of the last few days.
